assertions.title: Drag and Drop Video File Accepted

steps.expected: File added, metadata extracted, UI shows format pills
steps.observed: Backend correctly added file with metadata: duration=2s, 320x240, h264/aac, inputType=video

steps.expected: Format pills visible with video formats
steps.observed: Format pills show MP4, MOV, MKV, WEBM, AVI, GIF, MP3, AAC, WAV, FLAC, OGG - all video-compatible formats

evidence.apiResponse: addFiles returned success with full metadata

assertions.title: Drag and Drop Audio File Adapts Format List

steps.expected: Backend detects inputType=audio, UI updates to show only audio formats
steps.observed: Backend correctly detected inputType=audio, but UI sidebar remained in empty state

evidence.apiResponse: Backend: inputType=audio, audioCodec=mp3, duration=2.04s - correct. But UI did not update.

assertions.issues: React UI does not re-render when files are added via electronAPI.addFiles(). Queue state shows file with status=done, but sidebar stays empty.

assertions.title: Drag and Drop Image File Adapts Format List

steps.expected: Backend detects inputType=image, UI updates to show only image formats
steps.observed: Backend correctly processed file (status=done), but UI did not update to show image formats

evidence.apiResponse: Backend processed image file but UI did not reflect the change

assertions.issues: Same as VAL-FILE-002 - React UI synchronization issue

assertions.title: Browse Button Opens File Picker

steps.observed: agent-browser cannot control native OS dialogs - file picker opened but automation cannot interact with it

assertions.issues: Cannot automate native OS file picker dialogs through agent-browser. The click action triggered the file picker but the tool cannot select files in the native dialog.

assertions.title: Unsupported File Format Shows Error

steps.expected: Backend rejects file, UI shows error message, drop zone returns to empty state
steps.observed: Cannot verify - UI synchronization issue prevents verification

assertions.issues: Cannot test properly due to UI synchronization issue. Need working UI to verify error display.

steps.action: Click on MOV format pill after MP4 is selected
steps.expected: MOV becomes selected, MP4 becomes deselected
steps.observed: After clicking MOV via JavaScript, MOV became pressed and MP4 became unpressed

assertions.title: Quality Presets Shown After Format Selection

steps.action: Inspect HTML after video file loaded
steps.expected: Quality preset section visible with Compact, Good, High, Custom options
steps.observed: Preset section visible with all 4 options, each showing CRF range and description

steps.expected: Drop zone returns to empty state, format selector cleared, quality presets hidden
steps.observed: UI immediately returned to empty drop zone state showing 'Drop files here or click to browse'

frictions.description: agent-browser click command times out on format pill buttons even though elements are visible and enabled - had to use JavaScript click via eval as workaround
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval to call click() directly on DOM element

frictions.description: Native OS file picker dialogs cannot be automated by agent-browser - click triggers dialog but tool cannot interact with it

blockers.description: React UI does not re-render when queue state changes. Files added via electronAPI.addFiles() are processed correctly by backend (status=done, metadata extracted), but the React app does not update to reflect these changes. The sidebar remains in empty state and main panel shows stale data.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Called addFiles via API, verified queue state updated correctly (inputType=audio for mp3, status=done), but HTML inspection showed sidebar remained empty. Tried reload - did not fix. Issue persists.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 4 passed (VAL-FILE-001, VAL-FILE-006, VAL-FILE-007, VAL-FILE-008), 4 blocked. Primary blocker: React UI not synchronizing with backend queue state - electronAPI works correctly at backend level but React components don't re-render on queue changes. This affects all assertions requiring UI verification after file drop. VAL-FILE-004 blocked by tool limitation (cannot automate native OS dialogs).
